title: Library Overdue Notice
text:
## Library Overdue Notice

Dear {person},

Our records show that your {adjective} book, **The Secret Life of {plural noun}**, is {number} days overdue.

Please return it to the {place} branch or explain why it is covered in {food}.

**Current fine:** one {object}, two {plural noun}, and a promise to {verb} quietly.

If the book was eaten by a {adjective} {animal}, bring photographic evidence.

Thank you for supporting public {adjective} reading.
